summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Skimly MVP - Universal AI cognition layer. All core features working correctly including auth, AI analysis, knowledge management, and Pro feature restrictions.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, features, pricing sections
GET /api/auth/me returns user data when authenticated
Dashboard loads for authenticated user with stats
Text analysis works with OpenAI GPT-5.2 (POST /api/analyze)
Navigation between pages (Dashboard, Knowledge Base, Settings)
Pro features (Ask Brain, Digest) return 403 for free users
Knowledge Base displays saved items with key points
AI analysis results display structured output (key points, implications, actions, questions, personal relevance)
Stats cards update correctly after saving knowledge
